canonical_definition: Byte-level language modeling benchmark using 100 million bytes of raw Wikipedia text, assessing the model's ability to compress and predict long sequences with distant dependencies.
papers: Transformer-VQ: Linear-Time Transformers via Vector Quantization

definitions.paper: Transformer-VQ: Linear-Time Transformers via Vector Quantization

definitions.text: A standard English Wikipedia byte-level dataset used for training and evaluating compression models.

characterization: Byte-level language modeling benchmark using 100 million bytes of raw Wikipedia text, assessing the model's ability to compress and predict long sequences with distant dependencies.
